transcript: Speaker A: पाव, आपली जोडी लोकांना खूप आवडते. आपण नेहमी सोबत राहूया. [Pav, people love our pairing. Let's always stay together.] Speaker B: पाव, you're still with वडा? I mean, he can't even speak proper English. [Pav, you're still with Vada? I mean, he can't even speak proper English.] Speaker A: तो ट्राय करतोय. [He is trying.] Speaker B: Hahaha... he will never be able to speak fluent English like me. Speaker A: मिसळ बरोबर बोलतोय. तुझ्यासोबत राहून माझं इम्प्रेशन डाऊन होतंय. आजपासून आपलं संपलं. [Misal is right. Staying with you is bringing down my impression. From today, we are over.] Speaker C: नाही... [No...] Speaker D: वडा, रडून नाही जमणार तुला. तुला पावला दाखवावं लागणार, तूही इंग्लिश बोलू शकतोस. [Vada, crying won't help. You have to show Pav that you too can speak English.] Speaker D: रोज १५ मिनिटे AI टीचरसोबत इंग्लिश बोलायची प्रॅक्टिस केली. ग्रामर सुधारलं, प्रोनाउन्सिएशन क्लिअर झालं आणि हळूहळू कॉन्फिडन्स वाढला. [Practiced speaking English with an AI teacher for 15 minutes daily. Grammar improved, pronunciation became clear, and gradually confidence increased.] Speaker C: There was a time when someone rejected me because of my bad English... That was the turning point of my life. Today, I can speak confidently... because I worked on myself. Speaker B: अरे, वडा इंग्लिशमध्ये बोलतोय! हे कसं शक्य आहे? [Hey, Vada is speaking in English! How is this possible?] Speaker A: मी वडाला सोडून खूप मोठी चूक केली. [I made a huge mistake by leaving Vada.] Speaker C: जर वडा इंग्लिश शिकू शकतो, तर तुम्हीही नक्की शिकू शकता. आजच MySivi App डाऊनलोड करा. आणि फक्त १ रुपयाच्या ट्रायलमध्ये तुमची इंग्लिश स्पीकिंग जर्नी सुरू करा. कॉन्फिडन्स आला की रिस्पेक्ट आपोआप मिळतो. [If Vada can learn English, you too can definitely learn. Download the MySivi App today. And start your English speaking journey with just a 1 rupee trial. Once confidence comes, respect follows automatically.]

summary: An animated skit features Pav leaving Vada for Misal because Vada cannot speak English. Vada uses the MySivi AI English Speaking App to practice daily and becomes fluent, leaving Pav filled with regret. The ad encourages viewers to download the app and start their English-learning journey with a 1-rupee trial.
